_schema: Top rejection reasons and category distribution from po_core_dataset. GROUP BY rejection_category, then top-N approval_note. Populated by the first_rejection CTE in queries/po-core-dataset.redshift.sql.
_notes: Deferred from V1 first-pass because the first_rejection CTE requires ROW_NUMBER over ~29M PO log rows and needs a tight date window to complete inside the MCP query timeout. Next refresh should include it, scoped to log_datetime >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'.

Headline rejection COUNT is already live via po-health.json (48,259 POs with any rejection over the last 12 months, ~2.9% rate). This file is the deeper breakdown (reason category + top literal notes).
